title: Velvety Decadent Thai Dark Chocolate Khanom Krok
description: An exotic Thai dessert featuring a sour and velvety dark chocolate custard, wrapped in a delicate coconut-based wrapper.
instructions: Whisk together the coconut milk, cornstarch, and sugar in a medium saucepan until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2 minutes, or until the mixture has thickened.
Remove from heat and stir in the dark chocolate chips until melted and smooth.
Let cool slightly, then whisk in the egg yolks and salt.
Strain the mixture into a clean bowl and let cool to room temperature.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours or overnight.
When ready to serve, heat the mixture in the microwave or in a double boiler until warm and fragrant.
Pour the mixture into small ceramic cups or ramekins and chill in the refrigerator for another 10-15 minutes to set.
Serve chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of lime zest if desired.
